body.title: CLOSED: Migrate budget.py + notebook.py + pending_replies.py to native Postgres
body.result: budget.py + notebook.py + pending_replies.py fully migrated to native Postgres; test class updated to Postgres; 4483 tests pass; commit 7ad45110
body.description:
Three small callers with mechanical SQLite-ism migrations:

1. `lab/utility_closet/budget.py` line 249: `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO budget_config (key, value) VALUES ('spending_cap_usd', ?)` → `INSERT INTO infra.budget_config (key, value) VALUES (%s, %s) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value`

2. `wild_igor/igor/tools/notebook.py` lines 138–151: `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO entries (id, ...) VALUES (?,×9)` → `ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET ...` with `%s` placeholders

3. `wild_igor/igor/memory/pending_replies.py` lines 120–125: `?` → `%s`; line 126 `cur.lastrowid` → add `RETURNING id` to INSERT, `row_id = cur.fetchone()[0]`

**Affected files:** `lab/utility_closet/budget.py`, `wild_igor/igor/tools/notebook.py`, `wild_igor/igor/memory/pending_replies.py`
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database — native Postgres syntax only
**Scope boundary:** These 3 files only; no shim changes.
**Test plan:** Run full test suite; grep confirms no `INSERT OR REPLACE` or `?` SQL placeholders in these files.
**Pass condition:** All tests green; `grep -n 'INSERT OR REPLACE\|INSERT OR IGNORE' lab/utility_closet/budget.py wild_igor/igor/tools/notebook.py wild_igor/igor/memory/pending_replies.py` returns 0 results.

Validation: Igor budget cap readable/writable; pending_replies INSERT returns correct integer id.
Cleanup: test fixtures via conftest.pg_test_schema.
